data.description:
Comment/string-only residue, verified no behavior. Sites: rebar:193 ('brainstorm sessions'); ticket-lib.sh:595 ('dso-abc1' example); ticket-comment.sh:69 (PREPLANNING_CONTEXT example); ticket-list-epics.sh:303 ('Preplanning may mistakenly add'); ticket-compact-all.sh:64 ('DSO tickets'); ticket-fsck-recover.sh:15 ('dso ticket show'); ticket-scratch.sh:3 ('dso ticket scratch'); ticket-purge-bridge.sh:12 ('dso-*, w20-*'); ticket_resolver.py:3 (plugins/dso path); ticket_reducer/_sort.py:8 + ticket-init.sh + ticket-lib.sh + 4 test files (dso-xxxx historical ticket-id citations, sweep optional); _attestation.py:56; alert_store.py:21; health.py:1,17,118; applier.py:142-143,3148-3150 ('dso ticket transition' examples); invariants.py:30,39 ('Canonical dso ticket ID format'); reconcile.py:529 (old plugin path-walk comment); outbound_differ.py:611-612,748; tests/scripts/conftest.py:101 (names guard '_dso_network_guard'; actual fixture is _network_guard at tests/conftest.py:73); test-ticket-lib.sh:718,987,993 (dead 'DSO WARN' grep alternation — no source emits it); tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_rebar_id_label_writers.py:282 (dso-config.conf -> .rebar/config.conf). Optional: test fixtures using DSO as the Jira project key (bridge_test_helpers.py:24 JIRA_KEY=DSO-100 etc.) are pure test data — rename to PROJ- only if zero-grep-hits is the goal.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All listed comment/doc sites reworded to rebar equivalents or removed
- [ ] git grep -inE '/dso:|plugins/dso|dso-config|dso ticket ' src/ docs/ returns nothing
- [ ] No behavior change; full suite green
data.title: Mechanical dso comment/doc sweep (Tier C/D/E residue, ~25 sites)
